title: Vicloon Organic Cotton Baby Swaddle Blanket Wrap, 2 Pack, Pink, Graphic Pattern, 75x60cm, 0-3 Months, 7-14lbs
features: 【Pack of 2】Includes 2pcs baby swaddle blanket wrap. Bright colors and cute little patterns make them perfect for boys and girls. Suitable for babies from 0 to 3 months.

【Soft and Breathable】 Baby swaddle made of 100% lightweight cotton, safe for babies, not only beautiful, but also breathable. It is gentle on the delicate skin of babies and can protect them from irritation.

【Adjustable Shoulder Strap】 Our blankets have self-closing straps to protect your newborn baby and can be easily adjusted to get the perfect fit. You can adjust the sturdy hook-and-loop closures to tighten or loosen them, keeping your baby comfortable all night long.
【Improve Sleep】 Baby swaddle blanket can comfortably wrap baby to provide comfortable sleep without putting pressure on the hips. For parents, it also means better sleep.
【Ideal Gift】Whether it's a new mother or a mother, this is a perfect baby gift. Our products are stylish, practical and easy to carry.
description: Product Description Now the baby's sleep needs to be healthier, deeper and more peaceful! Wrap your baby in our Vicloon swaddling blanket to provide them with warmth and safety. Our baby swaddle wrap newborn blanket is specially designed for your baby to prevent the baby from being awakened by random arm movements, prevent the baby from being disturbed by the startle reflex, and soothe disturbed babies or babies with colic. Fit your baby's size Original swaddling-the cartoon design of blue whale and elephant giraffe, loved by babies all over the world. 0-3 months. 7-14 lb 100% organic cotton Our swaddle is made of 100% organic cotton, which is soft, smooth and does not hurt the skin. We also conduct batch tests on all our materials to make them comply with the standards required by the European Union. Easy To Fasten Vicloon Baby Swaddle Wrap are easier to use than traditional swaddles. Our unique design has a pocket for baby’s legs and two wings that wrap safely round their arms and fasten easily at the front, making dealing with the most wriggly baby at 2am a doddle.
